title: coaching — realtime broadcast channels
description: Six broadcast channels. Tenant-level for admin + HR dashboards. Per-profile channels for assignments, certifications, and ratings — the coach's own management surface. Per-user channel for the coach's /me live widget. Certification-specific channel for expiration-cadence alerts.

channels.name: tenant.{tenantId}.coaching-profiles
channels.description: Tenant-wide coach roster lifecycle. Powers HR + admin dashboards.

channels.name: tenant.{tenantId}.coach-certifications
channels.description: Tenant-wide certification-expiration stream. Powers the compliance dashboard.
channels.notes: Expiration-cadence events are the highest-traffic broadcaster here — the nightly job can fire dozens of alerts on a large tenant.

channels.name: coaching-profile.{coachingProfileId}.assignments
channels.description: Per-profile assignment activity. Powers the coach's dashboard + admin's profile drill-down.

channels.name: coaching-profile.{coachingProfileId}.certifications
channels.description: Per-profile certification activity. Coaches watch their own cert-status.

channels.name: coaching-profile.{coachingProfileId}.ratings
channels.description: Per-profile skill-rating activity. Coach opt-in receive; admins always see.
channels.authorization: sanctum::authed AND (permission `coach_skill_ratings.view` OR (coaching_profile.staff.user_id = current_user_id AND coaching_profile.notify_on_rating = true))
channels.notes: Rating events are opt-in for the coach (some coaches prefer not to be notified about their own ratings — the `notify_on_rating` preference lives on CoachingProfile.metadata).

channels.name: user.{userId}.coaching
channels.description: Per-user coaching-events stream — the /me/coaching live widget for coaches managing their own profile + assignments + certifications.
events: CoachSkillRatingRecorded (where coaching_profile.staff.user_id = userId AND coaching_profile.notify_on_rating = true)
